CustomField.formula: HYPERLINK( "/lightning/cmp/c__lwcWrapper?c__lwcName=uploadStorePicturesLWC&c__versionId=" & CoverImgVersionId__c & "&c__fileType="& CoverImgFileType__c & "&c__contentBodyId="& CoverImgContentBodyId__c & "&c__recordId="& Id & "&c__versionIdField=CoverImgVersionId__c&c__contentBodyIdField=CoverImgContentBodyId__c&c__fileTypeField=CoverImgFileType__c&c__isImgManagement=true", IF ( ISBLANK( CoverImgVersionId__c ), IMAGE("/logos/Custom/Plus_Primary/logo.png", "Review", 20, 20), IMAGE("/sfc/servlet.shepherd/version/renditionDownload?rendition=thumb240by180&versionId=" & CoverImgVersionId__c & "&operationContext=CHATTER&contentId=" & CoverImgContentBodyId__c, "Preview is generating, please refresh later", 180, 240) ), "_parent" )
CustomField.label: Store Sampling Product Layout(Standard)1
